arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia BOMBSHELL: Liverpool & Chelsea given transfer hope
arts.sum: The Georgia winger is interested in joining PSG before the January window shuts, but the Ligue 1 giants aren’t able to fund a deal as things stand, which could help the likes of Chelsea and Liverpool hijack his proposed move to the French capital. TEAMtalk have revealed that Liverpool could use Federico Chiesa in a player-plus-cash swap deal for Kvaratskhelia, while Chelsea are eyeing his situation as they consider signing a new forward amid Mykhailo Mudryk’s current provisional suspension.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca confirms Chelsea transfer 'plan' with update on three players
arts.sum: With the prospect of players being cup-tied if they feature in the FA Cup and go on to join another English club, Maresca has confirmed that Ben Chilwell and Cesare Casadei will not be part of the squad to face Morecambe due to the possibility they could leave the club before the transfer window closes. Enzo Maresca has hinted that two Chelsea players could leave the club before the January transfer window closes.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Coach Maresca Confirms Casadei Will Not Be in Squad
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has announced that midfielder Cesare Casadei will not be included in the squad as transfer speculation grows surrounding the young Italian's future. This comes amid reports that Torino is preparing a renewed approach for the player, who has struggled to find his footing at Stamford Bridge. The post Chelsea Coach Maresca Confirms Casadei Will Not Be in Squad appeared first on FootItalia.com.
